checklist.question: Does the skill check gh auth status before cloning?
Does the skill use shallow clone (--depth 1) to minimize download?
Does the skill correctly identify the tech stack from config files?
Does the output include at least one syntactically valid Mermaid diagram?
Does the output include a Core Modules section with key APIs described?
Does the output include a Directory Structure table?
Does the output include Quick Start steps (install + run)?
Does the skill respect the --output location (notion/obsidian/path/default)?
Does the skill read actual source files (entry points, not just README)?
Does the skill run a quality check (Mermaid syntax, accuracy) before output?
